response.justification: Strong individual contributor with 13+ years of software development, solid technical breadth, and genuine interest in testing and developer tooling (test runners, CI/CD setup, TDD advocacy, workshops). However, the role requires 2+ years of formal people management and 3+ years in a technical leadership role, neither of which is evidenced in the resume — all positions are IC roles (Senior/Staff Software Engineer/Developer). No mobile-platform ecosystem experience at scale, no demonstrated organizational change leadership, and no clear ownership of build systems or compiler/release tooling at the scale implied by the JD.
strengths: Long tenure in software craftsmanship with deep testing/TDD focus (Fluent-Asserts, Trial test runner, Selenium course, Refactoring Dojos)
Polyglot full-stack experience including dev-ops, CI servers, and developer-tooling side projects relevant to engineering productivity
Public teaching and community work (workshops, talks, courses) signaling mentorship and communication skills
concerns: No people management or direct-report experience shown — JD requires 2+ years managing people
No formal technical leadership role (tech lead, staff with org scope) documented — JD requires 3+ years
No mobile-platform ecosystem or large-scale build/release infrastructure experience

key_factors.factor: Developer tooling and testing infrastructure background
